source_mode: Mode A residual; Mode B byproduct
capture_mechanism: physisorption + cryopumping; H2 not fully captured at 4 K
sticking_assumption: ASSUMED s ~ 0.01 at 4 K (low; literature-typical, not measured)
capacity_assumption: ASSUMED — capacity per panel area not measured
saturation_risk: HIGH — H2 saturates 4 K panels rapidly
regeneration_required: YES — bakeout / warm-up cycle, or supplemental cold trap at lower T
Mode_D_contamination_risk: HIGH if not captured before Mode D — H2 contributes to NV surface decoherence
measurement_required: In-system RGA H2 partial pressure after Mode B+C; QCM mass uptake; coupon analysis

capture_mechanism: physisorption on cold surface; cryocondensation below ~30-40 K
sticking_assumption: ASSUMED s ~ 0.3-0.8 at 4 K (depends on coverage; not measured here)
capacity_assumption: ASSUMED — depends on Mode B precursor flux and panel area
Mode_D_contamination_risk: HIGH — methane fragments are the dominant Mode B chemical memory species
measurement_required: RGA species-resolved (m/z = 15, 16); QCM mass uptake; witness coupon Raman/XPS

sticking_assumption: ASSUMED s ~ 1.0 at 4 K for heavier hydrocarbons
capacity_assumption: ASSUMED — capacity high but coverage on sensing surface is the failure mode
saturation_risk: LOW for capture; HIGH for migration to sensing surface
Mode_D_contamination_risk: HIGH — heavy hydrocarbons on the diamond surface are catastrophic for NV ODMR
measurement_required: RGA m/z > 28; coupon XPS surface composition; AFM topography

source_mode: all modes — outgassing from chamber walls; Mode B byproduct of incomplete decomposition
capacity_assumption: Effectively unlimited for typical loads, but Mode-D-side migration is the failure mode
saturation_risk: LOW for capture; MEDIUM for migration
Mode_D_contamination_risk: MEDIUM — water on diamond surface affects termination chemistry, NV charge state
measurement_required: In-system RGA H2O background; bakeout-protocol effectiveness measurement

Mode_D_contamination_risk: MEDIUM — CO interacts with diamond surface; less severe than hydrocarbons

capacity_assumption: ASSUMED — depends on Mode B chemistry and pulse history
saturation_risk: HIGH — heterogeneous fragments may accumulate and migrate
Mode_D_contamination_risk: HIGH if Mode C regeneration is incomplete; potential surface termination corruption
measurement_required: RGA full mass-scan; coupon XPS/Raman; AFM
